##NAMES=Haydeeite
##RRUFFID=R120085

##LOCALITY=Haydee mine, Salar Grande, Atacama desert, Chile
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Short, blue to blue-green prismatic euhedral crystals, associated with pale green atacamite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R120085
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 6.286 b: 6.286 c: 5.756 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 120 volume: 196.94 crystal system: hexagonal
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
